query: SELECT rn.id, rn.title, rn.summary, rn.body, rn.versionLabel, rn.category, rn.active, rn.publishedAt, rn.createdAt, COUNT(rna.id) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_notes rn LEFT JOIN release_note_acknowledgements rna ON rna.releaseNoteId = rn.id GROUP BY rn.id, rn.title, rn.summary, rn.body, rn.versionLabel, rn.category, rn.active, rn.publishedAt, rn.createdAt ORDER BY rn.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT rn.id, rn.title, rn.summary, rn.body, rn.versionLabel, rn.category, rn.active, rn.publishedAt, rn.createdAt, COUNT(rna.id) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_notes rn LEFT JOIN release_note_acknowledgements rna ON rna.releaseNoteId = rn.id GROUP BY rn.id, rn.title, rn.summary, rn.body, rn.versionLabel, rn.category, rn.active, rn.publishedAt, rn.createdAt ORDER BY rn.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;

rows.title: Edit update
rows.summary: Boost scoring, participant history, refresh behaviour, and update notes are now easier to understand.
rows.body: We have separated base daily points from named boosts, added a safer path for viewing participant history, prepared pull-to-refresh for the PWA, and introduced this edit update space so future changes are explained in-game.

messages: 30001	Community Care catch-up: recent app changes	A catch-up note for recent edits that should have been communicated as an in-game acknowledgement popup.	Community Care note: a few visible improvements were made before they were properly explained here. That was a communication miss, so this catch-up popup now records them clearly.

What changed: mobile navigation now supports swipe movement between sections with smoother transitions; boost tokens on the Board are tucked into a tappable drawer so the leaderboard is easier to read; the mobile top-three podium was redesigned as a horizontal stepped podium with rank-specific motion; and the Proof section design direction was reviewed so future proof posts can keep person, media, teaching, and deep thought together instead of losing context.

What you need to do: nothing is required except acknowledging this note. Going forward, visible edits should be posted through this Community Care / patch-note popup so participants know what changed and why.	Care catch-up 2026-05-10	community_care	1	2026-05-10 22:18:37	2026-05-10 22:18:37	0
